tasks.title: downsampleForContainer returns wrong result for non-integer or very large ratio due to truncating bitwise cast
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial arithmetic guard change: replace `ratio | 0` with clamped Math.floor or add upper-bound clamp before the bitwise op

tasks.title: downsampleForContainer does not guard against NaN or Infinity inputs
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial guard change: replace `<= 0` with `!Number.isFinite(x) || x <= 0` for all four parameters; same site as errors-2

tasks.title: downsampleForContainer returns an invalid Downsample cast when ratio|0 overflows to 0 (NaN or Infinity input)
tasks.reason_for_tier: same root-cause fix as errors-2/errors-3; adding a post-compute clamp or runtime assertion at return site is trivial

tasks.title: downsampleForContainer return type is structurally unchecked: no assertion that result is 1|2|4|8
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add a single runtime assertion or clamp at the return site after the NaN/overflow fix

tasks.title: downsampleForContainer tests do not cover NaN or very-large-ratio inputs that cause integer overflow
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial test additions; these cases are directly motivated by the confirmed errors-2/errors-3 bugs

tasks.title: downsampleForContainer test suite missing: mismatched-aspect-ratio case, ratio-exactly-3 boundary, and non-square containers
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial test additions covering asymmetric container and non-power-of-two ratio boundary

tasks.title: Policy errors use bare RangeError with no error code, making programmatic handling harder for callers
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add a `.code` property to the thrown RangeError instances; non-breaking

tasks.title: No test covers round-trip invariant: applyDecodePolicy output is a valid DecodeOptions accepted by the scheduler/session without further transformation
tasks.category: no contract testing / schema validation at boundary
tasks.reason_for_tier: requires understanding the DecodeOptions/EncodeOptions types from jxl-session/jxl-scheduler to write a meaningful cross-package structural check

tasks.title: applyDecodePolicy and applyEncodePolicy accept null base without throwing, silently spreading null
tasks.reason_for_tier: uncertain verdict; requires deciding whether JS/dynamic callers are an intended audience before adding a null guard
